'''patate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joltingly|joltingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joltingly|joltingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| patate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:patate|patate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:patatesher|patatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patatesherĂ«m|patatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:patatero|patatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:patateshĂ«|patateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patateshĂ«m|patateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipatatero|gokipatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipatateshĂ«|gokipatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatateshĂ«m|gokipatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopatankerom|gopatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopatankeshĂ«|gopatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatankeshĂ«m|gopatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopatankeya|gopatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pataterom|pataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patatemu|patatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:patateya|patateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipataterom|gokipataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatatemu|gokipatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipatateya|gokipatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:patatate|patatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:patatatesher|patatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patatatesherĂ«m|patatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:patatatero|patatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:patatateshĂ«|patatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patatateshĂ«m|patatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipatatatero|gokipatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipatatateshĂ«|gokipatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatatateshĂ«m|gokipatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopatatankerom|gopatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopatatankeshĂ«|gopatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatatankeshĂ«m|gopatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopatatankeya|gopatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:patataterom|patataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patatatemu|patatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:patatateya|patatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipatataterom|gokipatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatatatemu|gokipatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipatatateya|gokipatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠte|pĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠtesher|pĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠtero|pĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠtĂŠtero|gokipĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠterom|pĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠtemu|pĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠteya|pĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠtĂŠterom|gokipĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠtĂŠteya|gokipĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:paftafte|paftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:paftaftesher|paftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paftaftesherĂ«m|paftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:paftaftero|paftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:paftafteshĂ«|paftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paftafteshĂ«m|paftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipaftaftero|gokipaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipaftafteshĂ«|gokipaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipaftafteshĂ«m|gokipaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopaftafnkerom|gopaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopaftafnkeshĂ«|gopaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopaftafnkeshĂ«m|gopaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopaftafnkeya|gopaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:paftafterom|paftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paftaftemu|paftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:paftafteya|paftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipaftafterom|gokipaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipaftaftemu|gokipaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipaftafteya|gokipaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
